meaning: 1. a building of two or more stories; 2. CL:棟|栋[dòng],幢[zhuàng],座[zuò]
sentence: 村子里盖起了好几栋新楼房。
pinyin: Cūn zi lǐ gài qǐ le hǎo jǐ dòng xīn lóu fáng.
english: Several new multi-story buildings have been built in the village.

sentence: 老师今天讲课的时候用了很多图片。
pinyin: Lǎoshī jīntiān jiǎng kè de shíhou yòng le hěn duō túpiàn.
english: The teacher used a lot of pictures while teaching today.

sentence: 工程师测算了建桥所需的费用。
pinyin: Gōng chéng shī cè suàn le jiàn qiáo suǒ xū de fèi yòng.
english: The engineer measured and calculated the cost required to build the bridge.

meaning: 1. in a low voice; 2. (speak) in whispers
english: Please speak quietly in the library.

sentence: 这家咖啡馆的装修风格非常高雅。
pinyin: Zhè jiā kāfēiguǎn de zhuāngxiū fēnggé fēicháng gāoyǎ.
english: The décor style of this café is very elegant.
